title: Simulation Time Too Long When Simulating A Ring Oscillator With Small Jitter

features.name: femtosecond timeprecision with small delays
features.description: Code should include a timeprecision of 1fs used with delay values in the picosecond range or smaller

features.name: realtime type delay variables in oscillator
features.description: Code should include realtime-typed delay calculation variables used in an oscillator circuit with fine time resolution
features.snippet:
realtime coarse_delay, medium_delay, fine_delay;
assign coarse_delay = 0.5 * (coarse_cw * coarse_res + coarse_ofst);

features.name: inertial delay assignment with small delay
features.description: Code should include an inertial delay assignment using assign #delay with delay value under 1ns in a feedback loop

features.name: transport delay in always block with fine delay
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking transport delay in an always block with delay under 1ns used in a ring oscillator

features.name: ring oscillator feedback with mixed delays
features.description: Code should include a ring oscillator structure with feedback using both inertial and transport delays at fine time resolution
